title: Helios update manifest
description: Signed update-manifest contract (ADR-002). The Ed25519 signature (T22/T23) covers the RFC 8785 (JCS) canonicalization of this document with the `signature` field removed. Unknown fields are tolerated for forward compatibility: integrity comes from the signature over the full canonical form, not from additionalProperties. Signature VERIFICATION is implemented in S1-T23, not here.

schema_version.description: Manifest format version. A different value signals a breaking format change and is rejected (an old agent must not reinterpret a security artifact).

target_version.description: The agent version this manifest delivers (clean MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH release; each segment <= 9 digits to match the platform-independent parser).

allow_downgrade.description: Emergency-downgrade flag (AC-25). Default false. The trust decision around it is enforced in the updater (T24), not here.

released_at.description: Optional RFC 3339 release timestamp. The pattern gates the shape (jsonschema treats `format` as annotation-only); the updater's Go layer asserts exact RFC 3339 validity.

update_allowed.description: Optional kill-switch (UPD-5). When present and false, the updater must not apply the update.

artifacts.description: Per platform/arch binary artifacts. At least one is required.

url.description: HTTPS download URL with a host and no whitespace/control characters. Integrity comes from the signed hashes; HTTPS is defense in depth. The updater (T24/T25) re-validates via url.Parse.

size_bytes.description: Exact expected byte length of the artifact. Bounded to 2^53-1 so its signed (IEEE-754) canonical form is exact. Used as the download ceiling in T25.

sha256.description: Lowercase hex SHA-256 of the artifact bytes (the field name is the algorithm tag).

blake3.description: Lowercase hex BLAKE3-256 of the artifact bytes (the field name is the algorithm tag).

key_id.description: Identifier of the embedded signing key that produced `signature` (ADR-002).

key_revocation_list.description: Key-ids revoked by this (signed) manifest. May be empty. Enforced in T23.

signature.description: Base64 Ed25519 signature over the JCS canonicalization of this manifest WITHOUT this field. Excluded from the signing input. Verified in S1-T23.
